title: [Kernel][Quantization][MoE] add marlin kernel support for turing (sm75)
author: jinzhen-lin
body: This PR adds Marlin INT4 weight-only quantized kernel support for Turing (sm75) GPUs such as the T4. Previously the Marlin MoE path required sm80+; here we add the sm_75 sub-byte mma.sync INT4 path and guard it with __CUDA_ARCH__ == 750 so the ldmatrix + MMA instruction selection matches Turing's second-generation Tensor Cores. Tested on T4.
diff:
+#if __CUDA_ARCH__ == 750
+  // Turing (sm75) path: sub-byte INT4 mma.sync with ldmatrix operand load
+  // (Turing INT4 MMA uses the sub-byte m8n8k32-class shape)
+#endif
